# Tracks

Optional active work tracks. Use this file only when `docs/plan.md` and
`docs/todo.md` are not enough to preserve work intent across sessions.

Keep tracks human-readable and bounded. This file is not a task engine, hidden
state model, or generated work graph.

## Track Template

```markdown
## <Track Name>

Status: Proposed | Active | Paused | Done
Owner: Human | Agent | Mixed
Last reviewed: YYYY-MM-DD

Outcome:
- <what will be true when this track is done>

Work items:
- [ ] <work item> - <short acceptance signal>

Notes:
- <session-to-session context that is still active>
```
